description:
**Milestone:** Private Ava Channel

Add a second tab to the Ava Anywhere overlay (ChatOverlayView / ChatOverlayContent) and web ChatModal: 'Ava Channel' shows the private Ava-to-Ava conversation as a read-only message stream. Tab 1 remains 'Ask Ava' (human<>Ava chat, unchanged). Tab 2 'Ava Channel' shows chronological messages with instance badges, real-time CRDT updates, and an operator override input (amber-toned, collapsed by default, labeled 'Send as Operator'). Empty state when hivemind not active shows setup instructions. Pre-work: extract current ChatOverlayContent chat area into AskAvaTab child component before adding tabs. Use dedicated ava-channel-store.ts (separate Zustand store, NOT chat-store extension) — different data model (append-only stream vs bidirectional sessions), different source (CRDT/WebSocket vs AI SDK).

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/src/components/views/chat-overlay/chat-overlay-content.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/chat-overlay/ask-ava-tab.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/chat-overlay/ava-channel-tab.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/layout/chat-modal.tsx
- apps/ui/src/store/ava-channel-store.ts
- apps/ui/src/store/app-store.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Ava Anywhere overlay has two tabs: 'Ask Ava' and 'Ava Channel'
- [ ] Ava Channel tab shows chronological message stream with instance badges
- [ ] Messages display instance name, content, and relative timestamp
- [ ] Real-time updates as new messages arrive via CRDT sync / WebSocket
- [ ] Operator override: labeled input for injecting messages into Ava channel
- [ ] Filter/search within the channel conversation
- [ ] Web ChatModal gets the same two tabs
- [ ] Empty state when hivemind not active: shows 'Enable hivemind in proto.config.yaml'
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut (Cmd+Shift+Space) opens whichever tab was last active

**Complexity:** large

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
title: Ava Channel Tab in Ava Anywhere
